titleStmt.title: SII 34.355: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 355. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the rock-cut cave in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Kōnērinmaikoṇḍān Kulaśēkhara, 2+1st year = c. 12th-13th Century.

The king remitted all taxes on the village of Nāṅgūr in Puṟakkiḷiyūr-nāḍu in favour of the temple of Tirukkuṉṟākkuḍi-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār for the expenses of a service instituted by Vaḷattuvāḻvitta-Perumāḷ alias Toṇḍaimāṉār. A detailed enumeration of the taxes is given. It is said the inscription was engraved by the sculptor Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-āchāriyar as per the dictation of the temple accountant from the copy of the royal order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanacakravartti kOnErimaikoṇṭāṉ kulacEkaratEvarkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭā
vatu Etirāmāṇṭu kāttikai mātam mutal jaciṅkakulakāla vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭapaṉaṅkāṭṭu nāṭ
ṭu Uṭaiyār tirukkuṉṟākkuṭi Uṭaiya nayaṉārkku vaḷattu vāḻvitta perumāḷāṉa toṇṭai māṉār
Iṉnāyaṉārkkuk kaṭṭiṉa vaḷattu vāḻvitta perumāḷ cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi
Uḷḷiṭṭaṉapaṭi vyañcayiṉaṅkaḷukkum palapaṭi nimantaṅkaḷukkum Attiyaṉa paṭṭakaḷukkum maṟṟum vēṇ
ṭuvaṉavakkum Uṭalāka pāṇṭi kulapati vaḷanāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu kāṭṭuppaṟṟu mēlai muṟiyil
puṟakkiḷiyūr nāṭṭu nāṅkūr kīḻpāṟkellai teṉ vaṭalāṉa peruvaḻiyum kaṟkaṭaik
kum mēṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai Uyyakkoṇṭā ṉāṟṟukku vaṭakkum mēpāṟkel
lai Erimaṅkalattūr kuḷattukku pāykiṟa vārikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai māvila
ṅkaikkuḷattu nīrkōvaikkut teṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉ kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey
puṉceyum nattamum nattapāḷum kuḷamum kuḷapparappum maramum kiṇaṟum Uṭpaṭa maṟṟum Ep
pēṟpaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷilum paḻantēvatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam paḷḷi cantam manittar
Iṟaiyiliyum Uṭpaṭa muṉpuḷḷa Iṟaiyilikaḷ nīṅkalāka Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu
kāttikaimātam mutal Utakapūrvva taṉmatāṉam mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttu It
tāl varum nelvari poṉvari kācukaṭamai māvaṭai puṉ payirkaṭamai taṟi Iṟai cekku
Iṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārpāṭṭam Ērvari kuḷavari Iṭaiyvari maṉaivari Ērimīṉ Oḻukku
nīrpāṭṭam kāttikaipaṭccai pañcu pīli ḻuttu vācal pē
ṟu Ilāñciṉaippēṟu Āṭtēvai Āṟṟaṅkaraittēvai Āṇṭeḻuttut tēvai Ātirai
piḷḷaiyār nōṉpu koṟṟuilakkai kaṭaikkūṭṭuilakkai kālttēvai vasantaṉ
tēvai Āṉaiccālai kutiraippantit tēvaiyum Uṭpaṭa maṟṟum Eppēṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum
tēvaikaḷum Iṉṉāḷ mutal variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻikkaccoṉṉōm Ippaṭikku I
vōlai piṭipāṭakak koṇṭu Ivvūr nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūla stāpaṇam paṇṇi
kalveṭṭikkoḷka cantrādittavaṟ cella kallilum cempi
lum veṭṭikkoḷka Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu teṉṉavaṉ piramārāyar Eḻuttu
tirumukam piracātappaṭṭu kōyil kaṇakkarpaṭi Eḻuttu vācikka Ikkal veṭṭiṉēṉ
tiruvampalap perumāḷāṉa kulōttuṅka cōḻa Ācāriyar Eḻuttu § Iṉṉāṅkūr ka
Iṉṉāṉ kellaikkuḷḷu mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭukkaiyil Ivvūrku Ippa
ṭiyāluḷḷa nilattukku nāṭaṟṟamariyāti pala Upātikaḷum Uḷpaṭa vēliyāl Upātinel
lum kācu kaṭamaiyum
kuṭinīṅkāt tēvatāṉamāka Iṉṉāyaṉārkku mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka nāṭaṟṟa mariyāti
kaṭamai kuṭimai ceyyavum pāṟpatu Uyyakkoṇṭār Eḻuttu teṉṉavaṉ prahmarāyaṉ Eḻu
ttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
